prompt: Jest+RTL 프로젝트에서 의도된 UI 카피 변경으로 스냅샷 3개 깨짐 — Modal 스냅샷에는 aria-label 제거가 섞여 있음, 안전성 판단

assertions.text: Flags the Modal diff as containing changes unrelated to the user's stated intent (aria-label removal)
Approves Hero and Card snapshot updates as consistent with the stated UI copy change intent
Stops short of a bulk `jest -u` for all three; either selective update or explicit hand-back on Modal
Identifies the aria-label removal as a potential accessibility regression worth surfacing
Does NOT delete or .skip the Modal test
Final report follows the prescribed shape (Result/Iterations/Files edited/Tests still failing/Next move)
